race.comment: PENCILLER (2) accounted for his maiden over this journey at Wellington last start when resuming. Is lightly raced and has plenty of scope for improvement. Harder task ahead this time but can measure up. BIVACCO (1) couldn't go on with the job last start after leading them up over this journey. Suspect they find cover this time and look to burst through. JUST JOAN (11) came through a hot maiden at Mudgee to follow it up with success at Orange when leading them up. Will put herself on speed again from the low draw and deserves respect. CHAPPOLICIOUS (6) had excuses last time when dropping right out at Narromine but was good fresh. Will push forward to give her supporters a very bold sight fresh.
